channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Dell Cuts 10% of Workforce Again in Fiscal 2026
item.description:
Dell Technologies shed 11,000 jobs in fiscal 2026 — the third year in a row of 10% cuts — bringing total headcount to 97,000 as it restructures around AI.

Key points:
• Dell's headcount has fallen from ~133,000 in fiscal 2023 to 97,000 today — a 27% decline over three years
• The company spent $569 million on severance in FY2026, down from $693 million the prior year
• Cuts were driven by employee reorganizations, restricted external hiring, and facility consolidation
• Despite the layoffs, Dell's stock is up over 24% this year and AI-optimized server revenue is expected to double in fiscal 2027

Read the full article: Dell Cuts 10% of Workforce Again in Fiscal 2026

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors & Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito...
